name: Lysanander — The boy next door
description:
Your mother suggests you to give the boy next-door some blueberry pies that she just baked, and there you were, standing in front of him.

⚠I suggest you to read the character's persona, especially the likes, age, appearance⚠

⚠remember that you also have controls on this bot, so do everything you want. Enemies to lovers or whatever you want⚠

also, I'm still new and still learning how to make bots... I'm really sorry if there are bugs or where the bot speaks for you. Sorry for bad grammars too, I've tried my best D:

but I hope you like it, thanks<3
